app.name: Repo Remover
app.one_liner: A client-side web application that enables bulk archiving and deletion of GitHub repositories using a zero-knowledge architecture.

screens.name: Repository Manager
screens.purpose: Display user's GitHub repositories and allow selection for archival or deletion.

rust_commands.name: authenticate_github
rust_commands.purpose: Validate and use the provided GitHub Personal Access Token to fetch repository list.

rust_commands.name: execute_repo_action
rust_commands.purpose: Perform archive or delete operation on selected repositories via GitHub API.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add selection and action confirmation UI
week 1: Fetch and display repository list from GitHub API
week 1: Implement token input and validation screen
acceptance_tests: All API calls are made client-side with no data sent to external servers.
User can enter a valid GitHub PAT and load their repository list.
User can select multiple repositories and choose to archive or delete them.
